svg.text: Vector ALU opcode = 0x57 (0b1010111) funct3 selects group funct6 selects instruction within group
funct3 = 111 is reserved for configuration instructions (see section below)
Vector Configuration opcode = 0x57, funct3 = 111 same bit positions as ALU section
Vector Memory load opcode 0x07 store opcode 0x27 mop selects addressing mode
funct6 / funct3 / mop / width key discriminator fields
Figure N: All seven ALU groups share opcode 0x57. funct3 selects the group; funct6 selects the instruction within it.
Memory loads (0x07) and stores (0x27) share opcodes with scalar FP; the width field disambiguates (see Figure 2).
indexed mop=01 is unordered, mop=11 is ordered (x1 = either). zimm encodes vtypei; uimm encodes AVL for vsetivli.
